title: Postmodern Discourse
summary_pt_br: Discurso pós-moderno: ironia, metaficção, fragmentação, ceticismo com grandes narrativas.

scenes.subtitle_pt: Discurso pós-moderno: ironia, metaficção, fragmentação, ceticismo com grandes narrativas.

scenes.text_en: Irony, metafiction, fragmentation, grand-narrative skepticism. Focus: postmodern discourse. Metafiction lets the novel remember that it is a novel.
scenes.text_pt: Discurso pós-moderno: ironia, metaficção, fragmentação, ceticismo com grandes narrativas. Foco: postmodern discourse. Metaficção faz o romance lembrar que é romance.

scenes.title: Postmodern Discourse
scenes.body_en: Postmodern traits: IRONY everywhere. METAFICTION (story aware of itself). FRAGMENTATION (no unified arc). SKEPTICISM of grand narratives (progress, truth, nation).
scenes.body_pt: Discurso pós-moderno: ironia, metaficção, fragmentação, ceticismo com grandes narrativas.

examples.en: Metafiction lets the novel remember that it is a novel.
examples.pt: Metaficção faz o romance lembrar que é romance.

examples.en: Fragmentation resists the neat arc we were trained to expect.
examples.pt: Fragmentação resiste ao arco ordenado esperado.

examples.en: Postmodernism distrusts grand narratives of progress.
examples.pt: O pós-moderno desconfia de grandes narrativas de progresso.

exercise.question: Complete: "___ lets the novel remember that it is a novel."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Metafiction lets the novel remember that it is a novel."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Metaficção faz o romance lembrar que é romance.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: Fragmentation resists the neat arc we were trained to expect.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Fragmentation resists the neat arc we were trained to expect."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Fragmentação resiste ao arco ordenado esperado.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Postmodern Discourse — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre postmodern discourse. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: A story that knows it is one.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: We inherit its doubts, if not its style.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Postmodern discourse is doubt dressed as literature.

scenes.title: The seminar on irony
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe three postmodern traits. Use at least three postmodern terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the postmodern discourse seminar, Zara traced the intellectual lineage of irony from Kierkegaard to contemporary fiction.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Metafiction lets the novel remember, mid-sentence, that it is a novel — not a window onto a pretended real.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: And fragmentation resists the neat three-act arc we were trained to expect from every story since childhood.

paragraphs.speaker: Zara
paragraphs.en: Postmodernism distrusts grand narratives of progress, nation, truth — the single stories that flatten complicated lives.

paragraphs.speaker: Student
paragraphs.en: So irony becomes a survival tool — the refusal of naive belief in the stories we were handed.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Postmodern discourse, Zara said, is doubt that finally learned how to laugh at itself without losing its footing.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Postmodern Discourse". Irony, metafiction, fragmentation, grand-narrative skepticism. Metafiction lets the novel remember that it is a novel. Fragmentation resists the neat arc we were trained to expect. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Postmodern Discourse". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
